use_cases: Display individual cryptocurrency asset information with real-time pricing and percentage changes
Show portfolio holdings with leverage indicators and portfolio value tracking
Provide quick asset overview for crypto trading platforms and dashboards
Enable portfolio performance monitoring with compact number formatting
Support asset management interfaces with interactive add and menu actions
ai_summary: A sophisticated cryptocurrency asset card component featuring portfolio metrics display with gradient styling, animated interactions via Framer Motion, and support for displaying real-time price data, percentage changes, and leverage information. Designed for fintech dashboards and crypto trading platforms with mobile-responsive layout.
